Shopping from Home.
Almost Feels Like Home: Maggie and Darren start to settle in at Perth's central station, but Anna struggles with her work-life balance. Michael gets a very unusual reptilian call out.
No Longer Rookies: The Khan family have embraced life in Perth so fully that they've decided to make it permanent by purchasing land, while Anna is struggling with the shift hours.
Policing in Paradise: It's the end of probation and Maggie's dream of being a police dog handler is revived, while Michael returns to Perth from Halls Creek. Jay and his wife make a decision.

The Doctor and Sarah Jane face a deadly alien conspiracy in a tense showdown that will decide the fate of Earth.
The Doctor grows suspicious when the Master, disguised as Professor Thascalos, conducts dangerous experiments in time manipulation at a research institute.
The Master's time experiments create strange temporal distortions, forcing the Doctor to build his own 'time sensor' to counter the growing threat.
The Master summons Kronos, the time-eating Chronovore, but loses control as the creature wreaks havoc, leaving both the Doctor and UNIT scrambling to contain it.
The Doctor and Jo pursue the Master through the Time Vortex in a dramatic 'TARDIS-within-TARDIS' chase that tests both their machines and their wits.
Both TARDISes arrive in ancient Atlantis, where the Master manipulates King Dalios and Queen Galleia to gain control over the crystal that binds Kronos.
The Doctor and Sarah Jane face a deadly alien conspiracy in a tense showdown that will decide the fate of Earth.
The Doctor grows suspicious when the Master, disguised as Professor Thascalos, conducts dangerous experiments in time manipulation at a research institute.
The Master's time experiments create strange temporal distortions, forcing the Doctor to build his own 'time sensor' to counter the growing threat.
The Master summons Kronos, the time-eating Chronovore, but loses control as the creature wreaks havoc, leaving both the Doctor and UNIT scrambling to contain it.
The Doctor and Jo pursue the Master through the Time Vortex in a dramatic 'TARDIS-within-TARDIS' chase that tests both their machines and their wits.
Both TARDISes arrive in ancient Atlantis, where the Master manipulates King Dalios and Queen Galleia to gain control over the crystal that binds Kronos.
The Doctor enters the labyrinth to try and protect Jo from the minotaur but the Master has seized control of Atlantis and prepares to summon Kronos again.
Mysterious energy creatures begin attacking UNIT headquarters as the Third Doctor investigates a strange cosmic force linked to a nearby black hole.
As the situation worsens, the Time Lords send the Second Doctor to assist. Together, the two Doctors uncover the source of the energy.
The three Doctors join forces in Omega's antimatter realm, discovering that their captor is a Time Lord hero turned vengeful after being trapped in his own creation.
The Doctors outwit Omega, restoring the balance between universes and earning the First Doctor's release from exile by the Time Lords.
The Doctor and Jo arrive on what appears to be a ship crossing the Indian Ocean in 1926, but strange time loops and monsters hint that something is very wrong.

Life on the North Yorkshire Moors Railway, following an eventful week during which plans are made to welcome star steam engine Royal Scot to the heritage railway.
Shopping from Home.
A teenager is in excruciating pain after falling and injuring his leg, and paramedics treat a 94-year-old man showing signs of a stroke. Plus, a man with severe stomach pain.
A young girl is reluctant to let the paramedics examine her cut head and a mature student needs medical help.
A newborn baby has breathing problems, paramedics treat an elderly lady who's fallen and hit her head, and crewmates investigate the worrying symptoms of a potential stroke victim.

It's Only Rock 'n' Roll: Sitcom about in-laws forced to share a flat below their children. Sam comes to Daphne's rescue when she discovers the devil's music - rock 'n' roll!
Winner Takes All: British sitcom about flat-sharing in-laws. Sam tries to play his cards right when he is challenged to a game of poker. Will he end up looking like a joker?
Ill Met by Candlelight: The second series of the family flat-sharing sitcom draws to a close. Daphne and Sam have different ideas as to what constitutes good news and bad news.
Four's a Crowd: Series three of the British sitcom about flat-sharing in-laws. The Major has departed under a cloud, but Daphne finds it hard to accept Sam as a silver lining.
One Flew Over the Perimeter Fence: British sitcom about flat-sharing in-laws. Daphne prepares for the Major's appointment at the police station.
